title: codereview-pass2: Incomplete CCP-16 coverage
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md lacks dedicated sections for TDMA slots calculation (fnv1a32 details, modulo), channel agility, time sync (epoch_floor, stratum, wall_clock_valid), hash selection per test vectors and parent epic. Overview paragraph is present but full sections required before closing. P2. Consistent with schc/rpl drafts which have detailed subsections. Parallel desync FSM research needed.
